allow: PowerShell($dl = "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads"; $p = Join-Path $dl "Marseille_Header_Article39.webp"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { "{0:N0} bytes" -f \(Get-Item $p\).Length } else { "MISSING"; Get-ChildItem $dl -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'Marseille|Header|Article' } | Select-Object Name })

PowerShell(node scripts/optimize-one.cjs; Remove-Item "scripts\\optimize-one.cjs" -Force; if \(\(Get-ChildItem "scripts" -Force | Measure-Object\).Count -eq 0\) { Remove-Item "scripts" -Force }; "--- folder ---"; Get-ChildItem "public\\images\\tourisme" -File | ForEach-Object { "{0,-24} {1,7:N0} KB" -f $_.Name, \($_.Length/1KB\) })

PowerShell($p = Start-Process -FilePath "npm.cmd" -ArgumentList "run","dev" -RedirectStandardOutput "d:\\taxi-v4-modifie\\taxi-v4\\.dev.out.log" -RedirectStandardError "d:\\taxi-v4-modifie\\taxi-v4\\.dev.err.log" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; $p.Id | Out-File "d:\\taxi-v4-modifie\\taxi-v4\\.dev.pid" -Encoding ascii; "started pid $\($p.Id\)")

PowerShell($dl = "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads"; $p = Join-Path $dl "92bea1fca412bf0dc413371a426c533593ceebb4-3864x1583.jpg"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { "{0:N0} bytes" -f \(Get-Item $p\).Length } else { "MISSING"; Get-ChildItem $dl -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '92bea1|3864' } | Select-Object Name })

PowerShell($dl = "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads"; $names = @\("WhatsApp_Image_2026-06-17_at_16_24_39.jpeg","WhatsApp_Image_2026-06-17_at_16_04_59.jpeg","WhatsApp_Image_2026-06-17_at_16_04_52.jpeg"\); foreach \($n in $names\) { $p = Join-Path $dl $n; if \(Test-Path $p\) { "{0,-50} {1,9:N0} bytes" -f $n, \(Get-Item $p\).Length } else { "MISSING: $n"; Get-ChildItem $dl -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'WhatsApp' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name } })
